=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (12:3-12:9) TS377048: Effect.Service requires the service type to be an object {} and not a primitive type. Consider wrapping the value in an object, or manually using Context.Tag or Effect.Tag if you want to use a primitive instead. effect(nonObjectEffectServiceType)
  Fix 0: "Disable nonObjectEffectServiceType for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable nonObjectEffectServiceType for entire file"
